capacity.attribution: The generated-ordinal vm_run_dir launch replaces the smaller legacy emit_str fallback. The mandatory native binding adds three resident bytes and moves the overlay VMA by two bytes without changing the Lisp blob or any composition dimension.

owner_decision: Authorize the three-byte Bank correction and two-byte overlay-headroom correction; no reclaim sweep for five effective bytes.

promotion_conditions.hardware_screenshot: must be repeated against the corrected committed candidate
promotion_conditions.wave_seal: still blocked pending visual acceptance and regular repin/G6

claim_limit: This authorization permits promotion of the measured native binding correction. It does not accept hardware appearance or seal Wave 1.
